prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别约2512→3474→3595→3126→3787名，整体呈波动后移趋势，2025年基准约3787名，近两年波动幅度约600名；该 校在湖南省物理类招生计划2021–2025年分别为70、70、71、71、70人，2026年计划70人，与2025年持平，无扩缩招变化，竞争基数不变。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 南开大学为985 、211、双一流高校，软科主榜2026年排名第21位（近年稳定在20–23名），属于国内顶尖综合性大学，办学层次稳固；2026年高考周期内声誉评价为明显负面， 主要涉及学术不端（院长论文造假被免职）、师德师风等事件，抖音热度排名第36位（较热），负面舆情可能对部分考生报考心理产生一定抑制；化学A+、工商 管理A+、应用经济学A+、数学A+、统计学A、物理学A等14个A类学科，学科实力雄厚，对高分考生仍有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机/电子信息/电气等工科专业社 会热度持续偏高，与南开大学物理类招生专业（工科试验班、理科试验班等）高度契合；湖南省物理类考生总数从2025年约32.0万增至2026年约34.7万（增幅约8.4%），竞争加剧；南开大学位于天津，非本省高校，在湖南省无本地招生倾斜，地域偏好因素中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合招生计划持平、考生 总数明显增加、学校声誉负面舆情等因素，竞争压力与报考热度相互对冲：考生总数增加推高竞争烈度，但负面声誉可能小幅降低报考意愿。权衡后预测位次在2025年3787名基础 上小幅后移至约3817名，区间3317–4317名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 2512 → 3474 → 3595 → 3126 → 3787, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. The baseline for 2025 is about 3787, with a fluctuation range of about 600 in recent two years. The enrollment plan for this university in Hunan Physics Category from 2021 to 2025 was 70, 70, 71, 71, 70 respectively, and the 2026 plan is 70, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction, and the competition base remains unchanged.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nankai University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. It ranks 21st in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking (stable at 20–23 in recent years), belonging to top domestic comprehensive universities with a solid academic foundation. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is significantly negative, mainly involving academic misconduct (dean's paper fabrication leading to dismissal) and teacher ethics incidents. Its Douyin popularity ranks 36th (relatively hot). Negative public opinion may somewhat suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. It has 14 A-class disciplines including Chemistry A+, Business Administration A+, Applied Economics A+, Mathematics A+, Statistics A, Physics A, etc., with strong disciplinary strength, still strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Electrical Engineering maintain high social popularity, highly matching Nankai University's Physics Category enrollment majors (Engineering Experimental Class, Science Experimental Class, etc.). The total number of Physics Category candidates in Hunan increased from about 320,000 in 2025 to about 347,000 in 2026 (an increase of about 8.4%), intensifying competition. Nankai University is located in Tianjin, not a local university in Hunan, with no local enrollment preference in Hunan, and regional preference factors are neutral.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as unchanged enrollment plan, significant increase in total candidates, and negative university reputation, competitive pressure and application popularity offset each other: the increase in total candidates raises competition intensity, but negative reputation may slightly reduce application willingness. After weighing, the predicted ranking is slightly shifted backward from the 2025 baseline of 3787 to about 3817, with a range of 3317–4317.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 3317–4317, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Economics Class, Clinical Medicine, Finance Class) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Mathematics and Big Data, Oral Medicine) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Engineering Experimental Class, Science Experimental Class) as a safe backup. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range, focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors.

学校层次与声誉.text: Nankai University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranked 21st in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with a stable level and strong appeal to high-scoring liberal arts students; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is significantly negative, involving incidents such as academic misconduct, with a Douyin popularity ranking of 36th (relatively hot), and negative public opinion may somewhat suppress application enthusiasm; related advantageous disciplines in History Category are outstanding: Chinese History A, World History A, Chinese Language and Literature A, Business Administration A+, Applied Economics A+, with strong disciplinary strength.
